Component Inventory

Every component on this screen.

FeedTabBarMolecule
TabsFriends · Global · Tonight — all live under Tab 2. Not separate nav destinations.
Active stateaccent-gold text + bottom border. Matches SortBar on My Shows — consistent active language.
DefaultFriends. Most relevant on open — your people first, the world second.
FeedCardOrganism
HierarchyPerson first (avatar + username + timestamp), show second (artist, venue, date, stars, note). Inverted from archive card — social context leads.
NoteCrimson Pro Italic · 13px — always shown if exists. The note is the social hook. No collapse.
Photo panelSame split layout as archive card — 38% right column — when user uploaded a photo. Falls back to full-width text card.
Tap targetFull card → Show Detail for that log. Avatar tap → that user's Profile.
UserRowMolecule
ChildrenAvatar (28px circle) + Username (Syne 800) + timestamp (DM Mono muted)
AvatarUser-uploaded profile photo. Circular crop. Falls back to initials on color bg if none set.
Username fontSyne 800 — the one place Syne leads. Username is identity, deserves the boldest weight.
FeedFooterMolecule
Stats♥ count · ↩ count · song count. Minimal — DM Mono 9px muted. Not the focus of the card.
Reactions♥ heart tap to react. Single reaction type for MVP — no emoji picker, no complexity. Expand in P1.
From MemoryShows in footer when applicable — same muted treatment as archive card.
FeedDividerAtomic
Variants"Earlier" — groups older posts within the session. "You're all caught up" — end of feed state.
Copy"You're all caught up" is intentional. Not "No more posts" or "End of feed." Affirming, not clinical.
aftershow.
Phase 3 · Friends Feed · Component Spec · May 2026
